items.caption: A slide with a title "hazardous waste" and a list of items that are considered hazardous waste under the federal rcras and state regulations. the list includes batteries, solvents, degreasers, and cleaners, old gasoline, fluorescent lights and other bulbs, mercury switches, manometers, thermometers, and other devices containing mercury, etc., and pesticides. the slide is likely part of a presentation or educational material regarding hazardous waste disposal.
